title: acacia angustissima var. frutescens
intro: Acacia angustissima var. frutescens, also known as the prairie acacia, is a variety of shrub or small tree that belongs to the Acacia genus of flowering plants. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, derived from its leaves, bark, and seeds. The health benefits of Acacia angustissima var. frutescens include treating wounds, reducing fever, and providing relief from pain and inflammation. In herbal preparations, the plant's parts are often dried and used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
